name: dreamworld
description: Apply DreamWorld to dreamworld problems. Technique: Despite impressive progress in video generation, existing models remain limited ...
paperTitle: DreamWorld: Unified World Modeling in Video Gen
content:
## Overview

This skill implements the technique from "DreamWorld: Unified World Modeling in Video Gen".

Key contribution: Despite impressive progress in video generation, existing models remain limited to surface-level plausibility, lacking a coherent and unified understanding of the world. Prior approaches typically incorporate only a single form of world-related knowledge or rely on rigid alignment strategies to introduce additional knowledge.

## When to use

- Apply when solving dreamworld problems
- When baseline approaches are insufficient
- Working with structured problem spaces

## When NOT to use

- If problem constraints limit complexity
- When simpler methods achieve target performance
- Time-critical scenarios with strict latency needs

## Core Technique

The paper proposes an approach through:

1. Problem formulation from the paper
2. Algorithm implementation as described
3. Integration with existing systems
4. Evaluation against baselines

## Implementation

1. Understand problem requirements
2. Implement core algorithm components
3. Configure evaluation metrics from paper
4. Compare against baseline methods
5. Tune hyperparameters for your domain

## References

Paper: https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.00466
